title: FALLEN WORLD
description: Fallen World (formerly Fallout Anomaly) is the hardest survival experience available for Fallout 4. Designed for those seeking a gloomy, horror-infused nightmare where the environment is as lethal as the creatures within it, Fallen World is its own unique vision of a collapsed Commonwealth. Featuring overhauled factions, multiple new quests, and terrifying new monstrosities, survival is a brutal calculation. With the S7 Skyrim-style leveling system, caliber-based ballistics, and a realistic medical overhaul, every run is an unrelenting struggle against the dark. Backed by a custom launcher and real-time updates, Fallen World is the definitive destination for those seeking the ultimate challenge in atmospheric horror survival.
author: Fallout Anomaly Team
